title: India Inc deepens AI adoption to stay ahead of legal curve
description: Major Indian corporations are swiftly integrating artificial intelligence into their legal departments. This approach is enhancing the efficiency of contract assessments, monitoring compliance and automating routine legal tasks. Firms such as the Aditya Birla Group and Adani Group are harnessing AI technologies to reduce legal expenditures and optimise operations.

description: Pope Leo XIV warned AI must be “disarmed” from uses that enable domination and exclusion, adding fresh scrutiny to Wall Street’s AI boom.

title: AI-backed reforms pave way for OECD
description: Thailand is advancing sweeping legal reforms, supported by artificial intelligence, as part of an ambitious effort to secure membership in the Organisation for Economic Co-operation and Development (OECD) by 2028, Deputy Prime Minister Pakorn Nilprapunt said.

title: Pope Leo XIV Warns AI Threatens Human Dignity, Compares it to Tower of Babel
description: Pope Leo XIV issued his first papal encyclical on Monday, May 25, warning that artificial intelligence (AI) threatens to normalize an anti-human vision and comparing the unchecked development of the technology to the biblical Tower of Babel. The encyclical, titled “Magnifica Humanitas” (Latin for “Magnificent Humanity”), calls for robust regulation and independent oversight to counter […]
content:

title: Team develops open-source framework to accelerate health AI research
description: A research team led by Columbia University has developed an open-source framework designed to streamline and accelerate artificial intelligence research using health data, addressing longstanding challenges in data standardization, reproducibility, and collaboration across institutions.
